message:
fix(ops): harden evidence link insertion with transaction wrapping and alert validation

Wrap insert_evidence_link in with_transaction for atomicity across the
alert existence check, duplicate detection, and INSERT. Previously these
three queries ran without transaction protection, creating a TOCTOU window
under concurrent writers.

Add alert_id existence validation: reject unknown alert IDs with a
descriptive error before attempting the INSERT. Add project_key cross-
reference validation: reject evidence links whose project_key doesn't
match the alert's owning project, preventing cross-project evidence
contamination.

Replace DefaultHasher-based link ID generation with deterministic FNV-1a
64-bit hash. DefaultHasher's output is not guaranteed stable across Rust
versions; FNV-1a provides a simple, portable, deterministic hash suitable
for non-cryptographic identifier generation.

Remove unused std::collections::hash_map::DefaultHasher and std::hash
imports.

Add tests: insert_evidence_link_rejects_unknown_alert_id verifying the
new alert existence check, insert_evidence_link_rejects_alert_project_
mismatch verifying cross-project rejection, and insert_evidence_link_
uses_deterministic_link_id verifying FNV-1a produces stable IDs that
match the stored link_id.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
